Table DCS_ORDER

Card of table DCS_ORDER

Name

DCS_ORDER

Code

DCS_ORDER

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_ORDER

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_CONSUMERORDER" schema

called "DCS_ORDER".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

Consider the data type for Implementation -

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_ORDER_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(ORDER_ID, MARKET_CODE))

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The result in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

8. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD1

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_ORDER

CKT_DCS_ORDER


Server validation rule of the table DCS_ORDER

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_ORDER

drop table DCS_ORDER cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_ORDER
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER (
DCS_ORDER_KEY TEXT not null,
ORDER_ID INTEGER not null,
EMAIL TEXT,
STORE TEXT,
USER_ID TEXT,
DCS_GIFTCERTIFICATE_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_PROMOTION_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_ORDERHISTORY_KEY TEXT not null,
TOTAL TEXT,
SUBTOTAL TEXT,
DISCOUNT TEXT,
PAYMENT_SURCHARGE TEXT,
SHIPPING_COST DECIMAL(38,4),
STATUS TEXT,
PAYMENT_ID TEXT,
COMPANY TEXT,
TAX_EXEMPT TEXT,
LANG_CODE TEXT,
B_CITY TEXT,
B_STATE TEXT,
B_COUNTRY TEXT,
B_ZIPCODE TEXT,
S_CITY TEXT,
S_STATE TEXT,
S_COUNTRY TEXT,
S_ZIPCODE TEXT,
ORDER_CHANNEL TEXT,
SUB_CHANNEL TEXT,
SEA_DELIVERY_METHOD TEXT,
RETURN_DELIVERY_METHOD DATE,
ORDER_TYPE TEXT,
RETAILER_ID TEXT,
RETAILER_NAME TEXT,
SWAP_TYPE TEXT,
RETURN_WAREHOUSE_CODE TEXT,
PAYMENT_INFORMATION TEXT,
SHIPPING TEXT,
STAFF_ID TEXT,
CREATED DATE,
UPDATED DATE,
UPDATEDSTATUS DATE,
SUBTOTAL_DISCOUNT TEXT,
TRACKING_NUMBER TEXT,
COUPON_CODE TEXT,
ORDER_REASON TEXT,
INVOICE_ID TEXT,
DETAILS TEXT,
PHONE TEXT,
S_ADDRESS TEXT,
TARGET_DELIVERY_TIME TEXT,
NOTES TEXT,
STATUS_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
ISSUE_CODE TEXT,
ORIGINAL_ORDER_ID INTEGER,
SHIPPING_EMAIL TEXT,
SHIPPING_CODE TEXT,
ISSUER_ID TEXT,
S_ADDRESS_3 TEXT,
IPADDRESS TEXT,
PAYMENT TEXT,
PROMOTION_NAME TEXT,
PROMOTION_IDS TEXT,
CUSTOMER_TYP TEXT,
SALES_CHANNEL TEXT,
REPLACEMENTREASON TEXT,
LENDING_ORDER TEXT,
REPLACEMENTREASONTEXT TEXT,
JUSTIFICATION_TEXT TEXT,
APPROVER_NAME TEXT,
APPROVER_ID TEXT,
SWITCH_ORDER TEXT,
TOUCHPOINT_ID TEXT,
MARKETING_OPTIN TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_ORDER primary key (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.DCS_ORDER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.ORDER_ID is
'Order Identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.EMAIL is
'User email address';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.STORE is
'Submarket/company identifier ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.USER_ID is
'User identifier';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.DCS_GIFTCERTIFICATE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.DCS_PROMOTION_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.DCS_ORDERHISTORY_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.TOTAL is
'Order total value';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SUBTOTAL is
'Order subtotal value - sum of the values of the order items including product discounts and excluding shipping deliveries or promotions on cart total';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.DISCOUNT is
'Discount based on the product price';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.PAYMENT_SURCHARGE is
'Order payment charges value';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SHIPPING_COST is
'Order shipping charges/cost value';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.STATUS is
'Order status code identifier (values vary per market):';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.PAYMENT_ID is
'Payment unique identifier';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.COMPANY is
'Store/company name';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.TAX_EXEMPT is
'Is order tax exempt (Y/N)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.LANG_CODE is
'Language Code- Order language code (EN, FR, ...)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.B_CITY is
'Order billing address - City';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.B_STATE is
'Order billing address - State / Province';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.B_COUNTRY is
'Order billing address - Country ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.B_ZIPCODE is
'Order billing address - Zipcode';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.S_CITY is
'Order shipping city';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.S_STATE is
'Order shipping address - State / Province';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.S_COUNTRY is
'Order shipping address - Country';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.S_ZIPCODE is
'Order shipping zipcode';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.ORDER_CHANNEL is
'the way how the order was placed, admin, call center, etc';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SUB_CHANNEL is
'Order sub channel specifies how order was placed by order channel - Sms, Email, Chat, Call back';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SEA_DELIVERY_METHOD is
'delivery identifier';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.RETURN_DELIVERY_METHOD is
'If return order, shipping method unique identifier';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.ORDER_TYPE is
'It can be regular, replacement, return, etc (market depending)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.RETAILER_ID is
'DCS user unique identifier that placed the order - Backend user (when order is placed through retailer)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.RETAILER_NAME is
'Backend user name (first name + last name) (when order is placed through retailer)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SWAP_TYPE is
'If it is a replacement order, char with type of replacement:';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.RETURN_WAREHOUSE_CODE is
'Warehouse code for return orders (depend on market rules not used by all markets)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.PAYMENT_INFORMATION is
'Payment description, a.e "Credit card", "Cash on Delivery", "Free of Cost" ..';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SHIPPING is
'Order data shipping details - if order data type is "L" - "SHIPPING_INFORMATION"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.STAFF_ID is
'DCS user unique identifier of backend user that placed the order';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.CREATED is
'Local date time of order creation - when order was placed';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.UPDATED is
'Local date time of order update - when order was updated';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.UPDATEDSTATUS is
'Local date time when order status was updated';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SUBTOTAL_DISCOUNT is
'Subtotal discount based on coupon';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.TRACKING_NUMBER is
'Order products shipment identifier for tracking purpose';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.COUPON_CODE is
'Order data details - Coupon code applied - if order data type is "C" -';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.ORDER_REASON is
'Return order reason if is return order';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.INVOICE_ID is
'Invoice identifier';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.DETAILS is
'Order details placed by customer or callcenter agent';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.PHONE is
'Phone Number';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.S_ADDRESS is
'Order shipping address - address line 1';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.TARGET_DELIVERY_TIME is
'Expected delivery time based on time calculation between delivery target time start and target delivery time end ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.NOTES is
'Order notes placed by customer or callcenter agent';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.STATUS_DESCRIPTION is
'Order status description';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.ISSUE_CODE is
'Issue code refers to the Case Management and identifies the issue created on a specific case.';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.ORIGINAL_ORDER_ID is
'If lending order - order unique identifier from regular order used for payment details';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SHIPPING_EMAIL is
'Order data shipping details - customer shipping email - if order data type classification is L - "SHIPPING_INFORMATION"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SHIPPING_CODE is
'Order data shipping details - shipping code - if order data type classification is L - "SHIPPING_INFORMATION"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.ISSUER_ID is
'DCS user unique identifier - Backend user (when order is placed through hostess or callcenter user)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.S_ADDRESS_3 is
'Order shipping address - address line 2';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.IPADDRESS is
'IP address used to place the order ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.PAYMENT is
'Payment description, a.e "Credit card", "Cash on Delivery", "Free of Cost" ...';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.PROMOTION_NAME is
'Promotion names applied to the order';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.PROMOTION_IDS is
'Promotion ids applied to the order';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.CUSTOMER_TYP is
'Customer type data (always "C" ) - if order data type classification is "A" - "ARVATO_ORDER_DATA_TYPE"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SALES_CHANNEL is
'Order data details - Sales channel identifier - if order data type classification is "A" - "ARVATO_ORDER_DATA_TYPE"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.REPLACEMENTREASON is
'If replacement or return order - replacement reason';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.LENDING_ORDER is
'Is order a lending order (1/0)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.REPLACEMENTREASONTEXT is
'If replacement or return order - return reason (same as REPLACEMENTREASON)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.JUSTIFICATION_TEXT is
'Order data details - justification text - if order data type classification  is "J" - "CASE_MANAGEMENT_ORDER_DATA_TYPE"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.APPROVER_NAME is
'Order data details - justification issuer name - if order data type classification  is "J" - "CASE_MANAGEMENT_ORDER_DATA_TYPE"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.APPROVER_ID is
'Order data details - justification issuer_id - if order data type classification is "J" - "CASE_MANAGEMENT_ORDER_DATA_TYPE"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.SWITCH_ORDER is
'Used in the past for IQOS / MESH conversion, no longer in use since ther are no MESH devices being sold and feature has been removed';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.TOUCHPOINT_ID is
'ID of the touchpoint (POS) assigned to the activity';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.MARKETING_OPTIN is
'Flag Opt In - Activity type "MARKETING_OPTIN" - Customer acceptance on marketing communication';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R15_ORDER_DCS_USER foreign key (USER_ID)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R17_ORDER_DCS_GIFT foreign key (DCS_GIFTCERTIFICATE_KEY)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_GIFTCERTIFICATE (DCS_GIFTCERTIFICATE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R18_PROMO_DCS_PROM foreign key (DCS_PROMOTION_KEY)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PROMOTION (DCS_PROMOTION_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R21_ORDER_DCS_ORDE foreign key (DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM (DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R22_ORDER_DCS_ORDE foreign key (DCS_ORDERHISTORY_KEY)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERHISTORY (DCS_ORDERHISTORY_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R47_USER__DCS_USER foreign key (MARKET_CODE)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
